query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "data journalist agent: transforming data into verifiable multimodal st" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by providing a concrete implementation of an LLM-based agent that extracts and classifies causal narratives from news text, which directly aligns with the user's interest in "Data Journalist Agents" that transform data into verifiable multimodal stories. Although the paper focuses on text-only causal extraction rather than the full multimodal output, it establishes the core mechanism (LLM-driven narrative generation from data) and domain (news journalism
